articles.title: European Commission confirms data breach after Europa.eu hack
articles.excerpt: The European Commission has confirmed a data breach after its Europa.eu web platform was hacked in a cyberattack claimed by the ShinyHunters extortion gang. [...]

articles.title: Kritisk sårbarhet i Oracle Identity Manager och Oracle Web Services Manager
articles.excerpt: Oracle informerar om en kritisk sårbarhet (CVE-2026-21992) i Oracle Identity Manager och Oracle Web Services Manager. Sårbarheten har fått en klassning på 9.8 enligt CVSS 3.1. [1]

articles.title: Råd kring säkerhet i e-post
